CreateResolver.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](DNS/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateResolver.name: Resolver name. Allows uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_/. Must start with a letter or Chinese character. Length: 1–65
CreateResolver.vpcId: ID of the VPC where the resolver resides
CreateResolver.ipModels.ipAddress: IP address within the subnet mask range (leave empty for automatic assignment)
CreateResolver.type: Resolver type. Values: outbound: outbound resolver; inbound: inbound resolver
